description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a tricycle landing gear. The fuselage is primarily white with blue accents along the tail, fuselage, and wingtips, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and features a clear, enclosed canopy with visible windows. The wings are straight and extend horizontally from the top of the fuselage, with no visible winglets or dihedral angles. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer, both accented with blue stripes. The landing gear includes two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all fixed and exposed.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with a white and blue color scheme, tricycle landing gear, and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-mounted straight wings, nose wheel, and forward cockpit windows.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the single propeller engine, fixed tricycle landing gear, and blue tail accents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the conventional tail design, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the propeller, cockpit, and blue-striped wingtips and tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
